acceptance_criteria.criterion: initialize_project creates a valid root index and ledger directory
initialize_project rejects when ledger already exists
create_work_package creates both the WP detail file and root index summary entry atomically
claim_work_package transitions READY to IN_PROGRESS only when dependencies are met
claim_work_package rejects when dependencies are not COMPLETE
update_work_package_status enforces all 6 legal status transitions
update_work_package_status rejects illegal transitions with descriptive error
update_work_package_status requires blocked_by for BLOCKED transitions
update_work_package_status increments revision on COMPLETE to IN_PROGRESS
pending_work_packages counter stays accurate across all status changes

summary: Implemented initialize_project tool in project-lifecycle.ts with validation and rejection logic
Implemented create_work_package tool in work-package.ts with auto-generated WP IDs and atomic dual-file writes
Implemented claim_work_package tool with dependency validation using canStartWorkPackage
Implemented update_work_package_status tool with comprehensive status transition validation
All tools use withLock for atomic operations on both root index and WP detail files
Updated index.ts to register all new tools in console.error message
TypeScript compilation verified with npx tsc --noEmit

comments.note: Code in all modified files is clean and follows established patterns. All functions use proper error handling, atomic operations via withLock, and comprehensive validation. No code smells or refactoring opportunities identified.

summary: Verified initialize_project creates valid root index and ledger directory
Confirmed initialize_project rejects when ledger already exists
Tested create_work_package creates both WP detail file and root index summary atomically
Verified auto-generated WP IDs are sequential and zero-padded
Tested claim_work_package transitions READY to IN_PROGRESS only when dependencies met
Confirmed claim_work_package rejects when dependencies not COMPLETE
Verified update_work_package_status enforces all 6 legal status transitions
Tested update_work_package_status rejects illegal transitions with descriptive errors
Confirmed update_work_package_status requires blocked_by for BLOCKED transitions
Verified revision increment on COMPLETE to IN_PROGRESS transition
Confirmed pending_work_packages counter accuracy across all status changes
Validated all tools return proper MCP error responses

comments.note: Minor schema ambiguity: create_work_package sets wpSummary.file to args.work_package_file (the spec file path), but schema docs suggest this should be 'ledger/WP-###.json'. Current implementation is consistent with existing ledger entries but may need clarification.
